title: Daddy Long Legs
writer: S.N. Behrman, Sonya Levien, Alfred Santell
actors: Janet Gaynor, Warner Baxter, Una Merkel
plot: Wealthy Jervis Pendleton acts as benefactor for orphan Judy Abbott, anonymously sponsoring her in her boarding school. But as she grows up, he finds himself falling in love with her, and she with him, though she does not know that...
